allow: Bash(node dist/index.js draft --message "Launched Beacon v0.3.0 — a local CLI that auto-drafts build-in-public posts from your git commits. New in this release: a guided 'beacon init' that takes you from install to your first draft in about two minutes \(it drafts from your latest commit before setup even finishes\), 'beacon doctor' setup diagnostics with a live provider ping, Bluesky and Mastodon support, digest mode that turns a week of commits into one 'here's what I shipped' post, drafting in any language, and a fully offline mode with Ollama where your diff never leaves your machine. The regex secret scanner always runs before any LLM call, and nothing is ever auto-posted — approving a draft just copies it to your clipboard. Also shipped a new website with docs and a changelog timeline generated straight from CHANGELOG.md at https://beacon-bip.vercel.app. Install: npm install -g beacon-bip")
Bash(node dist/index.js config set author-bio "an indie fullstack engineer building devtools in public")

Bash(node dist/index.js config set author-notes "Confident, direct, a little playful. First person. No corporate filler — never use words like unlock, empower, seamless, fortify, streamline, leverage, robust. Short sentences. Specific beats clever.")
